rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHOW GUM SIK QUAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/26/19. 1) The ending balance of cash in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. (LRSF 14.62). 2) Decedent did not name his trust in his will he only said a Trust created by me this date, where I am the Trustor and Trustee. Please file an abstract of Decedent's Trust or proof/pages of the Trust that show there is a valid executed Trust on 06/27/90 where Decedent is the Trustor and Trustee.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SEAN SHARMA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/26/19. Prior to review of petition, the following must be filed, and filed stamped courtesy copy of each delivered to Room 202 two weeks prior to the hearing: 1. Notice of Petition to Administer Estate 2. Proof of Publication 3. Acceptance of nomination by the Public Administrator 4. Real Property Declaration under Local Rule 14.27C In addition, a proposed order must also be delivered.
